intro: The sky isn’t big enough for all of us.
description:
Take to the skies in Bird Game III, a whimsical world where every feathered friend is trying to build the comfiest nest and claim a little patch of sky. Pick your favorite bird, flap into adventure, and discover a realm where every cloud hides a surprise and every branch is prime real estate.

Build your nest wherever you please—tucked in the trees or perched proudly on a cliff. Lay your eggs, keep them safe, and shoo away any nosy neighbors who wander a little too close. After all, birds will be birds.

Will you zip around as a hummingbird with caffeine-level energy? Strut across rooftops as a confident city pigeon? Or glide in like an eagle who definitely thinks they own the place?

Fly. Forage. Feather your home.
The sky is big, the birds are quirky, and the only thing that might fall… is your dignity when a kiwi outruns you.
